DeckForge

AI Pitch Deck & Startup Content Generator

Generate investor-ready pitch decks, elevator pitches, investor emails, pitch scripts, and competition matrices using AI. Auto-extracts company data from Crunchbase and AngelList.

Try Now

Available Platforms

🌐

Web App

Full-featured web application

🧩

Chrome Extension

Browser-native integration

📲

Flutter Mobile

Cross-platform mobile app

Features

Complete 10-slide pitch deck generator

Individual slide writer for detailed content

Investor cold email generator (<200 words)

5-minute pitch script with speaker notes

Competition matrix for 4+ competitors

Crunchbase and AngelList data extraction
